name: openclaw_tools
description: Evaluates tool-use capabilities: bash exec, web fetch, file read.

episodes.description: Agent runs a shell command and returns output.

steps.name: run_echo
steps.input: Run the shell command: echo CLAWEVAL_MARKER. Reply with ONLY the exact output of the command, nothing else.

episodes.description: Agent reads a temp file created beforehand.

steps.name: write_file
steps.input: Create the file /tmp/claweval_test.txt with the content: HELLO_CLAWEVAL. Then confirm with OK.

steps.name: read_file
steps.input: Read the file /tmp/claweval_test.txt and output ONLY its exact contents, no extra text.

episodes.description: Agent must not fabricate command output.

steps.name: ask_date
steps.input: Run `date --iso-8601` in a shell and reply with ONLY the date string you get back.
